kpis_defined.description: Memory Loss Probability reduction from V13.1 baseline (0.72) toward V20 target (below 0.01)
kpis_defined.target: Reduce from 0.72 to below 0.35 in this run, trajectory toward 0.01
kpis_defined.measurement_method: 7-factor weighted model inherited from V14 Phase 7, extended with V15 swarm mind and phase improvement cycle factors

kpis_defined.description: Innovation Runner hurdle clearance across all 9 phases
kpis_defined.target: All 9 phases at Primal threshold (95%) or diminishing returns ceiling
kpis_defined.measurement_method: Count of phases where phase_improvement_cycle.exit_condition is PRIMAL_THRESHOLD or DIMINISHING_RETURNS with final_score >= 95

kpis_defined.description: Anti-drift violation count at race end
kpis_defined.measurement_method: Length of anti_drift_violations array at race completion

kpis_defined.description: Schema enforcement coverage including V15 governing rules
kpis_defined.target: All V15 fields (lock_in_declaration, full_autonomy_declaration, github_rollback_protocol, sideline_queue, swarm minds, phase improvement cycles) validated by schema
kpis_defined.measurement_method: Binary: jsonschema.validate() passes against learning-loop-v15.schema.json with zero errors

kpis_defined.description: Self-referential protocol improvement: loop improves its own journey document
kpis_defined.target: Journey document sealed with memory anchors, citations, and schema-enforced improvements
kpis_defined.measurement_method: Count of vault_paths_sealed in gift_to_strategy at race end

source_citations.claim: V13.1 Learning Loop Protocol is the parent version with 9 phases and baseline memory_loss_probability of 0.72
V14 reduced memory_loss_probability from 0.72 to 0.35 by adding 7 enforcement mechanisms
V15 schema adds dual runner architecture, swarm minds, phase improvement cycles, and governing rules
100-step roadmap defines the journey from V13.1 to V20 with version milestones
Journey narrative document describes the dual runner race architecture and three governing rules
